CustomField.description: Publish Immediate DML usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsPublishImmediateDmlMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsPublishImmediateDmlConsumed__c / LimitsPublishImmediateDmlMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.PublishImmediateDml.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsPublishImmediateDmlConsumed__c / LimitsPublishImmediateDmlMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.PublishImmediateDml.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsPublishImmediateDmlConsumed__c / LimitsPublishImmediateDmlMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsPublishImmediateDmlConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsPublishImmediateDmlMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Publish Immediate DML usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Publish Immediate DML
